channel.title: Topi Tuulensuu
channel.description: Programmer by night, asleep by day

item.title: Chromebook, oh how I adore thee
item.description: For past month my on the go machine has been Samsung’s ARM Chromebook and it feels, at least to me, like a perfect laptop. This thing has it all: extreme portability, a long battery life, 3G for web on the go and best of all it’s very affordable, but let’s back up a bit…
